Rung.Comment:
============================================================ PRESCAN (POWERUP) HANDLING ============================================================ On Prescan, clear any "lurking" Commands. Unshelve and Unsuppress all alarms, but only Enable alarms for which Disable is not allowed. (Let Maintenance Disable persist through a power cycle...)
##### V4.00.00 2018-06-07: Deleted Cfg_PCmdClear; all Program Commands are now self-clearing. #####
Rung.Text: [OTU(PCmd_Reset) OTU(PCmd_Ack) OTU(PCmd_Suppress) OTU(PCmd_Unsuppress) OTU(PCmd_Unshelve) ,OTU(OCmd_Reset) OTU(OCmd_Ack) OTU(OCmd_Shelve) OTU(OCmd_Unshelve) ,OTU(MCmd_Disable) OTU(MCmd_Enable) ,OTU(Shelved) OTU(Com_AE.4) OTL(Com_AE.5) ,OTU(Wrk_Suppressed) OTU(Suppressed) OTU(Com_AE.7) OTL(Com_AE.8) ,XIO(Cfg_AllowDisable) OTU(Disabled) OTU(Com_AE.10) OTL(Com_AE.11) ];
